title: Construction crawler
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Construction crawlers''' were primitive machines used for maintenance and sanitation during the time of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Old Republic]]; generations before the outbreak of the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. They were confined to riding sets of tracks and performing their various tasks upon properties adjacent to the track. As the [[Planet/Legends|planetwide]] city of [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] grew into the sky, these machines were forgotten and left to fall into disuse and disrepair.

==Appearances==
*''[[Young Jedi Knights: The Lost Ones]]''
